title: UCI Concrete Strength Baseline Reproduction Ladder
targetType: public benchmark dataset with measurable baseline
actualExecutionPerformed: Fetched UCI dataset id 165 through ucimlrepo, checked basic schema quality, split 1030 rows into train and test partitions, and ran mean, median, and RandomForestRegressor models.
baselineOrSmokeResult: Mean baseline RMSE 15.903 and MAE 12.440; RandomForestRegressor RMSE 5.489 and MAE 3.802; RMSE delta -10.414.
whatSovrynLearned: On this exact split, a simple random forest substantially outperformed dummy baselines, while the data-quality pass found 25 duplicate full rows and no missing cells.
humanReadableSummary: Sovryn provisioned ucimlrepo, pandas and scikit-learn, loaded the UCI Concrete Compressive Strength dataset, executed an 80/20 regression baseline comparison, and found that RandomForestRegressor beat mean and median dummy baselines on the selected split.
